title: Entropy A Love Story - The Video
description: The full-length video of the play as performed for audiences in Los Angeles, CA. The video reflects the emotional qualities of the piece as well as the financial constraints of its creators at the time. Every performance was recorded, and this video comprises segments from each instance of the show.
creator: Christine Deitner
rights: Educational use includes non-commercial use of text and images in materials for teaching and research purposes. title: Final Poster

title: Final Draft of the Play
description: This play was pieced together from material found in letters, journals, poems, and conversations that transpired in various ways in a New York City that never knew a KMart in Astor Place. This final draft reflects discoveries made in two readings of the piece over the course of ten years.

title: Live Music
description: This live recording of Chris Lee (as Katherine, also on guitar) and Matthew Emerick (as Christopher) performing "Tell Me Why" was taken during one of the performances at the Whitmore Lindley Theatre in North Hollywood, CA. This is a song my father used to sing to us on car rides, but these artists gave it a life I could not have expected.
